summary: Frontend-only scoped verification on http://127.0.0.1:3456 passed for richer compare mode. Compare promo opens enriched compare experience, desktop matrix renders correctly, sticky compare CTA toggles mode reliably, and vendor navigation from compare cards returns to Home without regression.
action_items: No blocking issues found in this richer-compare scoped run.
Keep visual QA snapshots for desktop + mobile when compare content copy changes.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical code issue found in reviewed Home compare/sticky/navigation files for this scope.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated richer compare mode flows: compare promo open, desktop matrix visibility and key labels (Lokasi, Harga awal, Paket utama, Highlight layanan), compare cards present package/location/price/highlights, sticky CTA toggle open/close, and navigation from compare card to vendor detail and back. n8n availability webhook and booking submission webhook are MOCKED and not part of this run.
rca_of_issue: No reproducible defect found in this scoped test run.
